examples: Radiobiology (or radiation biology) seeks answers to these questions.
The past decade has witnessed an almost explosive growth of molecular radiobiology.
Taking radiotherapy of tumor stem cells as a contact point, strategy designed by radiobiology can essentially solve this problem.
"We've screened a lot of compounds...and this is the most promising drug we have come across, " says Richard Lofts of the Armed Forces Radiobiology Research Institute in Bethesda, Md.
